subcodes.first_line: The mention of the Leaf of the Command was inscribed by the Pen of God, and therein is concealed the melody of God upon a sacred strain [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر ورقه الامر انه کان من قلم الله مکتوبا و فیه ستر نغمه الله علی لحن قدس
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort
